selectionPolicy.notes: Compound-only wave selected from the expanded compound candidate supply with priority for safety/mechanism/conflict gaps and near-term promotable source likelihood.

targets.selectionWhy: Carryover compound with safety-critical and mechanism-critical unresolved gaps; already referenced on compound and herb surfaces with promotable authority-class source coverage available.
Carryover compound with unresolved safety/interactions and mechanism gaps; already represented in governed artifact but limited to research-gap notes.
High-value new compound candidate from compound-heavy balancing profile with publish-blocking safety/evidence/mechanism gaps and expected promoter-ready source classes.
New compound candidate with safety and mechanism deficits affecting comparison/discovery surfaces; suitable for immediate governed safety + mechanism scaffolding.
Safety-critical compound from intake queue with mechanism and constituent gaps where promoted sources can produce immediate governed deltas while preserving unresolved critical reporting.
